description_long: This is a large educational complex featuring a prominent multi-story main school building with a flat roof, visible HVAC units, and a pinkish facade. The campus includes several smaller auxiliary buildings, a large parking lot with marked spaces, and landscaped green areas with trees and pathways. The main building is set back from the street, with a driveway and sidewalks leading to the entrance, and the surrounding grounds are organized with lawns, shrubbery, and paved roads. The site also contains a sizable warehouse-like structure with a dark roof, likely serving as a gymnasium or multipurpose hall. The overall layout is rectilinear and modern, with clear zoning for vehicular and pedestrian access. The environment is urban, with the school integrated into a neighborhood of streets, houses, and open spaces.
description: A modern, multi-building school complex with a large main building, parking lot, green spaces, and auxiliary structures, set within an urban neighborhood. The design is rectilinear and functional, with landscaped grounds and clear access routes.
description_view_0: The view shows the broad side of the main school building with its pink facade, rooftop equipment, and adjacent parking lot, as well as the entrance drive and some green areas.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the main entrance approach, the driveway lined with trees, and the arrangement of smaller buildings and parking spaces behind the main structure.
description_view_2: From this perspective, the rear of the main building is visible, along with the full extent of the parking lot, auxiliary buildings, and a large warehouse-like structure.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the side of the main building, the street access, and the spatial relationship between the main structure, parking, and surrounding green areas.
